title: impl: chat_contact_changes, set, query, queryChanges
description:
What: Add 4 methods to impl JmapChatClient in methods/contact.rs.

Algorithm:
1. chat_contact_changes(&self, session, since_state: &str, max_changes: Option<u64>) -> Result<ChangesResponse, ClientError>:
   Standard /changes. Sends maxChanges: max_changes (None=null per chat_changes pattern — max_changes in serde_json::json! serializes None as null).
2. chat_contact_set(&self, session, input: &ChatContactSetInput<'_>) -> Result<SetResponse, ClientError>:
   Build patch Map. If Some(b): insert 'blocked'. If Some(dn): insert 'displayName' = dn.map(from).unwrap_or(Null). Send update:{input.id: patch}.
3. chat_contact_query(&self, session, input: &ChatContactQueryInput<'_>) -> Result<QueryResponse, ClientError>:
   Build filter Map. If Some(b): insert 'blocked'. If Some(p): insert 'presence'. filter_val = Null if empty, else Object.
   Build sort array: if sort_property is Some(s): [{property:s, isAscending: sort_ascending.unwrap_or(false)}], else omit sort key.
   Conditional position/limit (Pattern B: omit when None).
4. chat_contact_query_changes(&self, session, since_query_state: &str, max_changes: Option<u64>) -> Result<QueryChangesResponse, ClientError>:
   Mirror message_query_changes exactly. Omit maxChanges when None (Pattern B).

Update import in contact.rs to include all needed types from super.
Run cargo fmt, clippy, test. Close bead.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes; 4 methods on JmapChatClient in contact.rs; clippy clean
close_reason: chat_contact_changes, chat_contact_set, chat_contact_query, chat_contact_query_changes added to contact.rs
